prestazioni: AM20 6.0L V12 (engine code: AM20/6.0) forced-induction conversion via Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger (1.28 A/R, 106mm compressor inducer) with custom billet compressor wheel (6+6 blade configuration) and TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate (dual-port, 3-bar spring) for 12.5 psi peak boost, targeting 950+ hp on E85 fuel

Full titanium 4-2-1 equal-length exhaust manifold (hand-fabricated by Akrapović) with 3.5" diameter 304 stainless steel primary tubes, paired with a custom Akrapović Evolution Line Ti exhaust system featuring dual 4.5" carbon-fiber tips and electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure optimization

Bosch Motorsport MS17.8 engine management system with custom calibration by Cosworth (utilizing 12x Denso Iridium IKH22 spark plugs, 1,000cc ID2000 injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -12AN fittings for crankcase ventilation under sustained 1.5G lateral loads)
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS CC100-specific kit) with extended front fenders (35mm per side), rear quarter panels (50mm per side), and a custom front splitter with integrated air curtains (3D-printed from PA12 nylon via selective laser sintering)

Custom LED headlight assembly by JW Speaker (Model 8700 Evolution J3, DOT/ECE-compliant) with adaptive cornering functionality and a carbon-fiber housing, paired with a rear light bar featuring 12x Osram Oslon Black Flat S 6000K LEDs in a sequential turn signal pattern

Bespoke interior by Sabelt (carbon-fiber bucket seats with 6-point harnesses, Alcantara-wrapped roll cage, and a digital dash cluster by Motec (C127, 7" display) with integrated G-force logging and lap timer, replacing the stock analogue gauges
